calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-04-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated August 23, 2000 is admitted to probate. Sabina Tarnowka is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 4, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.
